description.value: The creature can fly through the air, using wings, jets, anti-gravity technology, or sheer psychic force. Its Flying movement rate is X. While flying, the creature can make no actions other than a Full Move unless it also has the Hoverer trait. X represents the creature's Flying movement rate.

system.benefit: The creature can fly with a movement rate of X. While flying, it can only make Full Move actions unless it also has the Hoverer trait. X is the Flying movement rate.
